newYear.name: HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW
newYear.description: The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW is a high-performance monochrome laser printer designed for small to medium-sized businesses.
newYear.fullDescription:
The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW is a high-performance monochrome laser printer designed for small to medium-sized businesses. With a print speed of up to 40 pages per minute (ppm) and automatic duplex printing, it ensures fast and efficient output. The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW delivers sharp and professional-quality prints with a resolution of 1200 x 1200 dpi. It features built-in Wi-Fi, Ethernet, and USB connectivity, offering seamless integration into office networks and mobile printing via HP Smart App. Compact and ENERGY STAR� certified, the HP LaserJet Pro 4003dw is an eco-friendly choice for reliable and cost-effective printing. Specifications
    Print Technology: Laser Resolution: Up to 1200 x 1200 dpi Print Speed: Up to 40 ppm (black) Connectivity: USB 2.0, Ethernet, Wi-Fi Paper Handling: Automatic duplex printing, 250-sheet input tray Monthly Duty Cycle: Up to 80,000 pages Eco-Friendly: ENERGY STAR� certified
WHY HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW? The HP LaserJet Pro 4003dw is perfect for businesses seeking a reliable and efficient monochrome printer. Its fast print speed, automatic duplex printing, and high monthly duty cycle make it ideal for high-volume tasks. With professional-quality output and eco-friendly features, it ensures cost-effective and sustainable performance. Its versatile connectivity options and compact design make it a valuable addition to any office setup.

newYear.name: HP DESK JET PLUS 4120 + HP 305 CATRIDGE

newYear.fullDescription:
The HP DESK JET PLUS 4120 is an affordable and versatile all-in-one printer designed for home and small office use. It offers print, scan, copy, and mobile fax functions, ensuring convenience and productivity. With a print speed of up to 8.5 pages per minute (black) and 5.5 pages per minute (color), it delivers reliable performance. The HP DESK JET PLUS 4120 supports wireless connectivity, including Wi-Fi Direct and the HP Smart App, for seamless mobile printing. Compact and ENERGY STAR� certified, the HP DeskJet Plus 4120 is an eco-friendly choice for everyday printing needs.

WHY HP DESK JET PLUS 4120? The HP DeskJet Plus 4120 is perfect for individuals and small offices seeking an affordable and reliable all-in-one printer. Its wireless connectivity and mobile fax capabilities make it convenient for modern workflows. With high-quality output and eco-friendly features, it ensures cost-effective and sustainable performance. Its compact design and versatile functionality make it a valuable addition to any workspace.

newYear.name: Samsung 8 kg Fully Automatic Top Load Washing Machine
newYear.description: The Samsung 8 kg Fully Automatic Top Load Washing Machine is a versatile and efficient appliance designed for modern laundry needs.
newYear.fullDescription:
The Samsung 8 kg Fully Automatic Top Load Washing Machine is a versatile and efficient appliance designed for modern laundry needs. Here are its key features and specifications:
    Type: Top Load Functionality: Fully Automatic Capacity: 8 kg, suitable for medium-sized households. Technology: Equipped with Digital Inverter Technology for energy efficiency and durability. Design: Features a tempered glass window and soft-closing door for convenience and safety.
    Wash Programs: Includes multiple options like Normal, Quick Wash, Delicates, Bedding, Baby Care, Jeans, Energy Saving, Aqua Preserve, Rinse+Spin, and Eco Tub Clean.
  • Tub Material: Stainless Steel for durability and hygiene.
  • Spin Speed: Maximum of 700 RPM.
  • Additional Features:
      EcoBubble� technology for efficient cleaning. BubbleStorm� for better detergent penetration. Dual Storm� for effective washing
    Power Requirements: AC 230V, 50Hz.
  • Dimensions: Approximately 98.8 x 54 x 56.8 cm.
  • Weight: 28.5 kg.
  • Warranty: 3 years comprehensive warranty on the product and 12 years on the motor.

newYear.name: BINATONE BLENDER & SMOOTHIE MAKER BLG-415
newYear.description: This BINATONE BLENDER & SMOOTHIE MAKER BLG-415 is perfect for preparing fruit juices, milkshakes, smoothies, and other healthy cocktails.
newYear.fullDescription:
This BINATONE BLENDER & SMOOTHIE MAKER BLG-415 is perfect for preparing fruit juices, milkshakes, smoothies, and other healthy cocktails. It features a 1.5L unbreakable jug, stainless steel blades, and a turbo power motor, ensuring smooth and efficient blending. The splash-proof lid and safety lock mechanism provide mess-free operation, while the dry mill grinder allows you to grind coffee beans, nuts, and spices.
    Capacity: 1.5 Litres Power: 300W - 350W Turbo Power Speed Settings: 2-speed plus pulse mode Blades: Stainless steel, rustproof Safety Features: Splash-proof lid and safety lock mechanism Additional Features: Facility to add ingredients during blending, dry mill grinder for coffee beans, nuts, and spices Voltage: 220-240V ~ 50/60Hz

newYear.name: iPhone 17 Pro 256GB (Physical & e‑SIM)
newYear.description:
UNIBODY DESIGN. FOR EXCEPTIONAL POWER.—Heat-forged aluminum unibody design for the most powerful iPhone ever made.

DURABLE CERAMIC SHIELD. FRONT AND BACK.—Ceramic Shield protects the back of iPhone 17 Pro Max, making it 4x more resistant to cracks². And the new Ceramic Shield 2 on the front has 3x better scratch resistance.³

THE ULTIMATE PRO CAMERA SYSTEM—With all 48MP rear cameras and 8x optical-quality zoom—the widest zoom range ever in an iPhone. It’s the equivalent of 8 pro lenses in your pocket.

18MP CENTER STAGE FRONT CAMERA— Flexible ways to frame your shot. Smarter group selfies, Dual Capture video for simultaneous front and rear recording, and more.

A19 PRO CHIP. VAPOR COOLED. LIGHTNING FAST.—A19 Pro is the most powerful iPhone chip yet, delivering up to 40 percent better sustained performance.

BREAKTHROUGH BATTERY LIFE—The unibody design creates massive additional battery capacity, for up to 33 hours of video playback.⁴ Charge up to 50% in 20 minutes.⁵

iOS 26. NEW LOOK. EVEN MORE MAGIC.—A fresh design with Liquid Glass. Beautiful, delightful, and instantly familiar. With a more vibrant Lock Screen, customizable backgrounds and polls in Messages, Call Screening, and more.⁶

BUILT FOR APPLE INTELLIGENCE—Personal, private, powerful. Write, express yourself, and get things done effortlessly.⁷

SATELLITE FEATURES—If you don’t have cell service or Wi-Fi, iPhone can connect to a satellite so you can send and receive messages and Tapbacks.⁸ In a severe car crash, iPhone can connect to emergency services when you can’t.⁹

STRONGER CONNECTIVITY. SUPERFAST SPEEDS.—Stay connected at faster speeds with secure connections to Wi-Fi 7¹⁰, 5G networks¹¹, and Bluetooth 6, plus eSIM.¹²

eSIM, FLEXIBLE. SECURE. SEAMLESS.—iPhone 17 Pro activates with an eSIM. With eSIM¹², you enjoy greater flexibility, enhanced convenience, increased security, and seamless connectivity, especially when traveling internationally.

PRIVACY—A whole new level of privacy and security. Built in.

newYear.name: Android TV Box
newYear.description: Turn your TV into a smart hub with the ZU30 Android TV Box. Featuring 2GB RAM, 16GB ROM, and 4K Ultra HD, it lets you stream YouTube, Netflix, and Prime Video with ease. With 1 HDMI port, 2 USB ports, and voice control via Ok Google, it’s the perfect addition to any setup.
